summary: Matrix recording captures a high‑energy Winterland set with stellar Jerry vocals on "If I Had The World To Give" and blazing performances of Scarlet Begonias, Fire On The Mountain and Eyes of the World, though sync glitches temper the listening experience.
review: The show is widely praised as an electric, tightly‑packed performance – Jerry’s guitar and vocal work on “If I Had The World To Give” and the scorching runs through Scarlet Begonias, Fire On The Mountain and Eyes of the World are repeatedly highlighted.  The matrix source delivers a vivid sense of the loosely packed audience and many listeners call the sound “super special,” but several note noticeable sync problems that make this version less than ideal.

ai_rating.rationale: Three reviewers give 4‑5 stars for an outstanding performance, while one points out recording sync issues; overall the show shines and the matrix is good but not flawless.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Listeners describe crisp, special sound quality and strong audience ambience, but there are reported sync glitches and an overly prominent audience mix in some versions.

standout_songs: If I Had The World To Give
show_quality.setlist_flow: The concert is described as high‑energy from start to finish, with seamless transitions and a particularly powerful second set that keeps the audience engaged.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia’s guitar tone and vocal delivery are repeatedly praised, especially on "If I Had The World To Give" and Jack Straw.
band_member_comments.Drums: The drum work is highlighted as “so good” and a key part of the show’s momentum.
